generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are increasingly relying on us for their defense, while our own infrastructure remains vulnerable? A recent report shows that 68% of Americans feel unsafe due to inadequate national security measures. Strengthening our alliances isn't just about supporting others—it's about ensuring our own safety. Let's prioritize our security and demand better preparedness at home. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
